description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBeige bag with textured knit pattern and greyish green printOne main zippered compartmentZippered pocket at backInner separator with zippered pocketSynthetic lining with zippered pocketTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 33 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 11 cm
